message:
✨ Add SSE streaming for jobs, configmaps, secrets, NVIDIA operators, and fix 5s deadline (#992)

Add SSE progressive streaming to 4 remaining REST-only endpoints:
- Jobs (/api/mcp/jobs/stream)
- ConfigMaps (/api/mcp/configmaps/stream)
- Secrets (/api/mcp/secrets/stream)
- NVIDIA Operator Status (/api/mcp/nvidia-operators/stream)

Fix critical bug in streamClusters: replace waitWithDeadline(5s) with
wg.Wait() — the 5s maxResponseDeadline was killing ALL SSE streams
prematurely. Per-cluster timeouts already handle cancellation.

Frontend hooks (compute.ts, workloads.ts, config.ts) now try SSE
first for progressive rendering, with REST fallback.
Also updates GPU nodes hook to use existing SSE backend endpoint.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
